# Military Saddle

- **Type**: TAH|XPHB
- **Cost**: 20 gp
- **Weight**: 30 lb.

A saddle comes with a bit, a bridle, reins, and any other equipment needed to use the saddle. A Military Saddle gives [[advantage]] on any ability check you make to remain mounted.
